description_long: This is a classic stone fountain with a robust, cylindrical pedestal supporting a wide, circular basin. The basin features a thick, rounded rim and sits atop a square stone base, providing stability and a sense of permanence. Rising from the center of the basin is an ornate, urn-shaped structure with a decorative finial at the top and several spouts protruding from its sides. The stone surface is textured and appears weathered, suggesting durability and suitability for outdoor urban environments such as plazas or parks. The fountain's design is symmetrical, with subtle ornamental details on the upper urn and spouts, evoking a traditional European style. No visible water is present, but the spouts and basin indicate its intended function as a water feature.
description: A traditional stone fountain with a wide circular basin, ornate urn centerpiece, and multiple spouts, set on a square base. The textured stone and classic design evoke a sense of permanence and elegance.
description_view_0: Front view showing the urn centerpiece, prominent spout, and the full circular basin with a thick rim.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the symmetrical spouts on either side of the urn and the depth of the basin.
description_view_2: Rear view with the urn and spout visible, showing the curvature of the basin and pedestal.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, with the urn and spouts visible and the stone base clearly outlined.
attribute_ornamentation_details: The urn centerpiece features subtle decorative ridges and a finial at the top, with small ornamental spouts extending from its sides. The basin rim is thick and rounded, adding to the classical aesthetic.
attribute_basin_structure: The basin is wide, circular, and deep with a thick, rounded rim and a single tier. It is supported by a cylindrical pedestal and sits on a square stone base.
attribute_jet_or_spray_pattern: The fountain has multiple spouts arranged symmetrically around the urn, oriented horizontally, but no visible water jets or spray patterns are present.
